compact_width.label: Compact width (characters)
compact_width.description: Text width when not hovering. The title only actually shrinks to this if it's longer -- a short title just stays put.

expand_width.label: Expanded width (characters)
expand_width.description: Text width while hovering. If the title is still longer than this, it scrolls as a marquee instead of growing further.

icon_size.label: Icon size (px)
icon_size.description: Per-app icon size when compact (not hovering). Only affects the real app icon -- the generic fallback glyph (shown when no icon can be resolved) is a fixed size, since the plugin API doesn't expose glyph sizing.

icon_size_hover.label: Icon size on hover (px)
icon_size_hover.description: Per-app icon size while hovering; animates between this and the compact size along with the text width.
